IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: The Cedarburg Education Foundation provides a means for schools individuals and businesses to work together to help students achieve their potential by providing financial support through private funding.
IRS990.MissionDesc: The Cedarburg Education Foundation provides a means for schools individuals and businesses to work together to help students achieve their potential by providing financial support through private funding.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: Annual report is published on the website and financials are available upon request
